1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""P3S/P3F acceptance audit + receipt: enumerate the 5x2x12 active-universe
     3	endpoint ROOTs for a mode, validate each against the acceptance checks, and emit
     4	a compact machine-readable summary + downstream file map for the commit gate.
     5	
     6	Per-file acceptance checks:
     7	  schema (4 trees present), finite POT, event counts, native-miss metadata,
     8	  ENDPOINT IDENTITY (metadata band/idx match the filename), truth-authoritative
     9	  completeness (signal_reco==truth_denom), and point-cloud branch presence
    10	  (signal part_gen_*+part_reco_*; background+data part_reco_*) since these ROOTs
    11	  are dumped with MNV101_DUMP_POINTCLOUD=1.
    12	
    13	Campaign provenance recorded: git HEAD (source commit), installed-binary md5+mtime,
    14	launcher path + git blob hash (manifest hash proxy).
    15	
    16	Usage: p3s_manifest_summary.py [--mode standard|fps] [--out <json>]
    17	Exit 0 iff mode is 120/120 complete AND every present file passes; 2 otherwise.
    18	"""
    19	import argparse, hashlib, json, os, subprocess, sys
    20	import ROOT
    21	
    22	BANDS = ["BeamAngleX", "BeamAngleY", "MuonResolution",
    23	         "Muon_Energy_MINERvA", "Muon_Energy_MINOS"]
    24	PLAYLISTS = ["1A","1B","1C","1D","1E","1F","1G","1L","1M","1N","1O","1P"]
    25	TREES = ["mc_truth_denom", "mc_signal_reco", "mc_background", "data"]
    26	SIG_PC = ["part_gen_E", "part_gen_pdg", "part_reco_E", "part_reco_pos", "part_reco_z"]
    27	RECO_PC = ["part_reco_E", "part_reco_pos", "part_reco_z"]
    28	
    29	def _sh(cmd):
    30	    try:
    31	        return subprocess.check_output(cmd, shell=True, text=True,
    32	                                       stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL).strip()
    33	    except Exception:
    34	        return None
    35	
    36	def get_val(f, name):
    37	    o = f.Get(name)
    38	    if o is None:
    39	        return None
    40	    if hasattr(o, "GetVal"):
    41	        return o.GetVal()
    42	    if hasattr(o, "GetTitle"):
    43	        return o.GetTitle()
    44	    return None
    45	
    46	def main():
    47	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    48	    ap.add_argument("--mode", default="standard")
    49	    ap.add_argument("--repo", default="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold")
    50	    ap.add_argument("--out", default=None)
    51	    a = ap.parse_args()
    52	    base = os.path.join(a.repo, "nd-unfolding", "active_universe_5d", a.mode)
    53	    out = a.out or os.path.join(base, f"p3s_{a.mode}_manifest.json")
    54	    os.makedirs(base, exist_ok=True)
    55	
    56	    binpath = os.path.join(a.repo, "MINERvA101/opt/bin/runEventLoopOmniFold")
    57	    launcher = "nd-unfolding/sbatch_evloop_array_5d_active_laterals.sh"
    58	    prov = {
    59	        "mode": a.mode,
    60	        "source_commit": _sh(f"cd {a.repo} && git rev-parse HEAD"),
    61	        "binary_md5": _sh(f"md5sum {binpath} | cut -d' ' -f1"),
    62	        "binary_mtime": _sh(f"stat -c '%y' {binpath}"),
    63	        "launcher": launcher,
    64	        "launcher_git_blob": _sh(f"cd {a.repo} && git hash-object {launcher}"),
    65	        "expected_full_phase_space": (a.mode == "fps"),
    66	    }
    67	
    68	    files, present, missing, bad = [], 0, [], []
    69	    endpoints = {}
    70	    for band in BANDS:
    71	        for ep in (0, 1):
    72	            key = f"{band}_{ep}"
    73	            agg = {"playlists_present": 0, "size_bytes": 0,
    74	                   "entries": {t: 0 for t in TREES},
    75	                   "mcPOT": 0.0, "dataPOT": 0.0, "nMisses": 0,
    76	                   "migration_abs": 0, "isLateral": None, "identity_ok": 0}
    77	            for pl in PLAYLISTS:
    78	                p = os.path.join(base, key,
    79	                                 f"runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_{pl}_active_{band}_{ep}.root")
    80	                rec = {"band": band, "endpoint": ep, "playlist": pl,
    81	                       "path": os.path.relpath(p, a.repo),
    82	                       "exists": os.path.exists(p) and os.path.getsize(p) > 0}
    83	                if not rec["exists"]:
    84	                    missing.append(f"{key}/{pl}"); files.append(rec); continue
    85	                rec["size"] = os.path.getsize(p)
    86	                f = ROOT.TFile.Open(p)
    87	                if not f or f.IsZombie():
    88	                    rec["readable"] = False; bad.append(f"{key}/{pl}:zombie")
    89	                    files.append(rec); continue
    90	                rec["readable"] = True
    91	                checks = {}
    92	                # schema
    93	                ent = {}
    94	                for t in TREES:
    95	                    tr = f.Get(t); ent[t] = int(tr.GetEntries()) if tr else -1
    96	                rec["entries"] = ent
    97	                checks["schema_4trees"] = all(f.Get(t) for t in TREES)
    98	                checks["counts_positive"] = ent["mc_truth_denom"] > 0 and ent["mc_signal_reco"] > 0
    99	                # POT finite
   100	                mcPOT = get_val(f, "mcPOTUsed"); dataPOT = get_val(f, "dataPOTUsed")
   101	                import math
   102	                checks["pot_finite"] = (mcPOT is not None and dataPOT is not None
   103	                                        and math.isfinite(mcPOT) and math.isfinite(dataPOT)
   104	                                        and mcPOT > 0 and dataPOT > 0)
   105	                # native-miss metadata
   106	                nMiss = get_val(f, "nTruthOnlyMisses"); hasMiss = get_val(f, "hasTruthOnlyMisses")
   107	                checks["misses_meta"] = (nMiss is not None and hasMiss is not None)
   108	                # endpoint identity
   109	                aBand = get_val(f, "activeUniverseBand"); aIdx = get_val(f, "activeUniverseIndex")
   110	                aEn = get_val(f, "hasActiveUniverse"); aLat = get_val(f, "activeUniverseIsLateral")
   111	                checks["identity"] = (aBand == band and aIdx is not None and int(aIdx) == ep
   112	                                      and aEn == 1 and aLat == 1)
   113	                rec["identity"] = {"band": aBand, "idx": aIdx, "hasActive": aEn, "isLateral": aLat}
   114	                # completeness (Phase 18.2)
   115	                td, sg = ent["mc_truth_denom"], ent["mc_signal_reco"]
   116	                comp = (sg / td) if td else None
   117	                rec["completeness"] = comp
   118	                checks["completeness"] = (comp is not None and abs(comp - 1.0) < 0.02)
   119	                # point-cloud presence
   120	                sigtr, bkgtr, datr = f.Get("mc_signal_reco"), f.Get("mc_background"), f.Get("data")
   121	                checks["pc_signal"] = all(sigtr and sigtr.GetBranch(b) for b in SIG_PC)
   122	                checks["pc_bkg"] = all(bkgtr and bkgtr.GetBranch(b) for b in RECO_PC)
   123	                checks["pc_data"] = all(datr and datr.GetBranch(b) for b in RECO_PC)
   124	                f.Close()
   125	                rec["checks"] = checks
   126	                rec["pass"] = all(checks.values())
   127	                mig = 0
   128	                files.append(rec)
   129	                if rec["pass"]:
   130	                    present += 1
   131	                    agg["playlists_present"] += 1
   132	                    agg["size_bytes"] += rec["size"]
   133	                    for t in TREES:
   134	                        if ent[t] > 0: agg["entries"][t] += ent[t]
   135	                    agg["mcPOT"] += mcPOT or 0.0; agg["dataPOT"] += dataPOT or 0.0
   136	                    agg["nMisses"] += int(nMiss or 0)
   137	                    if aLat is not None: agg["isLateral"] = int(aLat)
   138	                    agg["identity_ok"] += 1
   139	                else:
   140	                    bad.append(f"{key}/{pl}:" + ",".join(k for k, v in checks.items() if not v))
   141	            td, sg = agg["entries"]["mc_truth_denom"], agg["entries"]["mc_signal_reco"]
   142	            agg["completeness_sig_over_td"] = (sg / td) if td else None
   143	            endpoints[key] = agg
   144	
   145	    summary = {"provenance": prov, "expected": 120, "present_and_passing": present,
   146	               "complete": present == 120, "missing": missing, "failing": bad,
   147	               "endpoints": endpoints}
   148	    with open(out, "w") as fh:
   149	        json.dump({"summary": summary, "files": files}, fh, indent=2)
   150	
   151	    print(f"[audit {a.mode}] passing={present}/120 complete={summary['complete']} "
   152	          f"missing={len(missing)} failing={len(bad)}")
   153	    print(f"[prov] commit={prov['source_commit'][:10] if prov['source_commit'] else '?'} "
   154	          f"bin_md5={prov['binary_md5']} launcher_blob={ (prov['launcher_git_blob'] or '?')[:10]}")
   155	    for key, agg in endpoints.items():
   156	        c = agg["completeness_sig_over_td"]
   157	        print(f"  {key:26s} {agg['playlists_present']:2d}/12  lat={agg['isLateral']}  "
   158	              f"id_ok={agg['identity_ok']}  c={('%.6f'%c) if c else 'NA':>8}  misses={agg['nMisses']}")
   159	    if bad:
   160	        print("FAILING:", "; ".join(bad[:12]))
   161	    print(f"summary -> {out}")
   162	    sys.exit(0 if summary["complete"] and not bad else 2)
   163	
   164	if __name__ == "__main__":
   165	    main()

item.text: The P3S receipt now records 120/120 passing endpoints, and ten ~53.8 GB merged ROOTs exist. However, that receipt’s `migration_abs` field is initialized but never populated (`p3s_manifest_summary.py:73–76,127–143`), so it is not merged-migration evidence. I’m tracing the separate merge audit and the downstream adoption contract next; four unfold logs are present, but no completed unfold ROOTs were visible in the first inventory.

     2	# STANDARD P4 stage-1: 10 endpoint hadd-merges (CONC-capped for Lustre) + acceptance

    15	}

    20	  [[ -s "${MERGED}" ]] && echo "[merge] REDO ${BAND}:${EP} (existing invalid/partial)" && rm -f "${MERGED}"

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""P4-FPS merged-endpoint audit (Agent C). GATE between the P3F merge and the endpoint
     3	unfold: confirms each of the 10 merged FPS active omnifiles carries everything the unfold
     4	(unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py) consumes AND the selection-complete active-universe census.
     5	
     6	Per merged endpoint the HARD gates are:
     7	  - the 4 unfold trees present + nonzero entries: mc_signal_reco, mc_background, data, mc_truth_denom
     8	  - POT metadata present, finite, >0: dataPOTUsed, mcPOTUsed (hadd-summed over the 12 playlists)
     9	  - hasTruthOnlyMisses object present (native-miss accounting the unfold reads)
    10	  - identity metadata matches the filename: activeUniverseBand==BAND, activeUniverseIndex==EP,
    11	    activeUniverseIsLateral==1, hasActiveUniverse==1
    12	  - migration census params present (activeUniverse{Truth,Reco}{Entrants,Exits}, hadd-summed)
    13	  - selection-migration is band-dependent: the ANGLE bands (BeamAngleX/Y) cross the muon-angle
    14	    selection cut so zero migration is a HARD FAIL; the ENERGY/momentum bands (MuonResolution,
    15	    Muon_Energy_*) shift muon momentum -> in FPS (muon truth cuts dropped, no reco momentum cut
    16	    they cross at +/-1sigma) they cause (pt,pz) BIN migration, not selection entrant/exit, so zero
    17	    selection-migration is EXPECTED and only a WARNING (the real applied-check is the nonzero
    18	    downstream lateral covariance in p4_validate_active_lateral_fps.py). Confirmed 2026-07-17: all
    19	    5 bands' shifts are applied (endpoints differ per-event; MuonRes rel 1e-2, MINOS 3e-2, MINERvA
    20	    4e-6 -- tiny because MINOS dominates forward-muon p||).
    21	Writes a compact JSON summary; exit 0 iff every endpoint passes every hard gate.
    22	
    23	  audit_merged_fps.py --merged-dir active_universe_5d/fps/merged \
    24	      --out active_universe_5d/fps/covariance/audit_merged_fps.json
    25	"""
    26	import argparse, json, os, sys
    27	import ROOT
    28	
    29	ROOT.gROOT.SetBatch(True)
    30	BANDS = ["BeamAngleX", "BeamAngleY", "MuonResolution",
    31	         "Muon_Energy_MINERvA", "Muon_Energy_MINOS"]
    32	# angle bands cross the muon-angle selection cut -> MUST show selection migration; energy/momentum
    33	# bands cause (pt,pz) bin migration only in FPS -> zero selection-migration is expected (warn only).
    34	ANGLE_BANDS = {"BeamAngleX", "BeamAngleY"}
    35	TREES = ["mc_signal_reco", "mc_background", "data", "mc_truth_denom"]
    36	CENSUS = ["activeUniverseTruthEntrants", "activeUniverseTruthExits",
    37	          "activeUniverseRecoEntrants", "activeUniverseRecoExits"]
    38	
    39	
    40	def get_val(f, key):
    41	    o = f.Get(key)
    42	    if not o:
    43	        return None
    44	    try:
    45	        return o.GetVal()
    46	    except AttributeError:
    47	        # TNamed (string metadata) -> GetTitle
    48	        try:
    49	            return o.GetTitle()
    50	        except AttributeError:
    51	            return None
    52	
    53	
    54	def audit_one(path, band, ep):
    55	    rec = {"path": os.path.basename(path), "band": band, "endpoint": ep, "fails": []}
    56	    if not os.path.exists(path):
    57	        rec["fails"].append("missing merged file")
    58	        return rec
    59	    f = ROOT.TFile.Open(path)
    60	    if not f or f.IsZombie():
    61	        rec["fails"].append("cannot open / zombie")
    62	        return rec
    63	    # trees + entries
    64	    ents = {}
    65	    for tn in TREES:
    66	        t = f.Get(tn)
    67	        if not t:
    68	            rec["fails"].append(f"missing tree {tn}")
    69	            ents[tn] = None
    70	        else:
    71	            ents[tn] = int(t.GetEntries())
    72	            if ents[tn] <= 0:
    73	                rec["fails"].append(f"tree {tn} has 0 entries")
    74	    rec["entries"] = ents
    75	    # POT
    76	    dp, mp = get_val(f, "dataPOTUsed"), get_val(f, "mcPOTUsed")
    77	    rec["dataPOTUsed"], rec["mcPOTUsed"] = dp, mp
    78	    if dp is None or mp is None:
    79	        rec["fails"].append("missing POT metadata")
    80	    else:
    81	        import math
    82	        if not (math.isfinite(dp) and math.isfinite(mp) and mp > 0 and dp > 0):
    83	            rec["fails"].append(f"invalid POT data={dp} mc={mp}")
    84	    # native-miss object
    85	    if not f.Get("hasTruthOnlyMisses"):
    86	        rec["fails"].append("missing hasTruthOnlyMisses")
    87	    # identity metadata
    88	    aBand = get_val(f, "activeUniverseBand")
    89	    aIdx = get_val(f, "activeUniverseIndex")
    90	    aLat = get_val(f, "activeUniverseIsLateral")
    91	    aEn = get_val(f, "hasActiveUniverse")
    92	    rec["identity"] = {"band": aBand, "idx": aIdx, "isLateral": aLat, "hasActive": aEn}
    93	    if str(aBand) != band:
    94	        rec["fails"].append(f"activeUniverseBand '{aBand}' != '{band}'")
    95	    if aIdx is None or int(aIdx) != ep:
    96	        rec["fails"].append(f"activeUniverseIndex {aIdx} != {ep}")
    97	    if aLat is None or int(aLat) != 1:
    98	        rec["fails"].append(f"activeUniverseIsLateral {aLat} != 1")
    99	    if aEn is None or int(aEn) != 1:
   100	        rec["fails"].append(f"hasActiveUniverse {aEn} != 1")
   101	    # migration census (hadd-summed TParameter<long> over the 12 playlists)
   102	    cen = {k: get_val(f, k) for k in CENSUS}
   103	    rec["census"] = cen
   104	    rec["warnings"] = []
   105	    if any(v is None for v in cen.values()):
   106	        rec["fails"].append("missing migration census param(s)")
   107	    else:
   108	        tot = sum(abs(int(v)) for v in cen.values())
   109	        rec["migration_abs_total"] = tot
   110	        if tot == 0:
   111	            if band in ANGLE_BANDS:
   112	                rec["fails"].append("zero selection-migration (angle band must cross the angle cut)")
   113	            else:
   114	                rec["warnings"].append(
   115	                    "zero selection-migration (expected for an energy/momentum lateral in FPS: "
   116	                    "the shift drives (pt,pz) bin migration, not selection entrant/exit; the applied "
   117	                    "shift + nonzero covariance are verified downstream)")
   118	    f.Close()
   119	    return rec
   120	
   121	
   122	def main():
   123	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   124	    ap.add_argument("--merged-dir", default="active_universe_5d/fps/merged")
   125	    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
   126	    a = ap.parse_args()
   127	
   128	    out = {"merged_dir": a.merged_dir, "endpoints": [], "result": None}
   129	    all_fail = []; all_warn = []
   130	    for band in BANDS:
   131	        for ep in (0, 1):
   132	            path = os.path.join(
   133	                a.merged_dir,
   134	                f"runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_FPS_active_{band}_{ep}_universes_full.root")
   135	            rec = audit_one(path, band, ep)
   136	            out["endpoints"].append(rec)
   137	            mig = rec.get("migration_abs_total")
   138	            warns = rec.get("warnings", [])
   139	            status = "OK" if not rec["fails"] else "FAIL " + "; ".join(rec["fails"])
   140	            if not rec["fails"] and warns:
   141	                status = "OK (WARN: zero selection-migration; bin-migration band)"
   142	            print(f"[{band:22s} ep{ep}] entries={rec.get('entries')} "
   143	                  f"POT(d/mc)={rec.get('dataPOTUsed')}/{rec.get('mcPOTUsed')} "
   144	                  f"mig={mig} :: {status}")
   145	            all_fail += [f"{band}_{ep}: {m}" for m in rec["fails"]]
   146	            all_warn += [f"{band}_{ep}: {m}" for m in warns]
   147	
   148	    out["result"] = "PASS" if not all_fail else "FAIL"
   149	    out["n_endpoints"] = len(out["endpoints"])
   150	    out["fails"] = all_fail
   151	    out["warnings"] = all_warn
   152	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(a.out), exist_ok=True)
   153	    with open(a.out, "w") as fh:
   154	        json.dump(out, fh, indent=2)
   155	    print(f"\nRESULT {out['result']} ({out['n_endpoints']}/10 endpoints)"
   156	          + ("" if not all_fail else " :: " + str(len(all_fail)) + " hard failures")
   157	          + (f" :: {len(all_warn)} warnings" if all_warn else ""))
   158	    print(f"summary -> {a.out}")
   159	    sys.exit(0 if not all_fail else 1)
   160	
   161	
   162	if __name__ == "__main__":
   163	    main()
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	# P3S/P3F endpoint merge: for each (band,endpoint) with all 12 per-playlist active
     3	# ROOTs present, merge into one MEFHC endpoint ROOT under {mode}/merged/ using the
     4	# large-tree-safe merger (SetMaxTreeSize 300GB), NOT bare hadd (KNOWN_ISSUES #6).
     5	# skip-if-exists on the merged output; skip endpoints that are not yet 12/12.
     6	# Runs on a compute node (login can't run ROOT). Set FPS=1 for the P3F namespace.
     7	# NO set -u (conda activate); HOME fix inline.
     8	set -o pipefail
     9	export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb/
    10	
    11	REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    12	ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    13	source "${REPO}/setup_salloc_env.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1
    14	PLAYLISTS=(1A 1B 1C 1D 1E 1F 1G 1L 1M 1N 1O 1P)
    15	BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
    16	if [[ "${FPS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then MODE=fps; else MODE=standard; fi
    17	MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/merged"
    18	mkdir -p "${MERGEDIR}"
    19	
    20	echo "[merge] mode=${MODE} start $(date -u +%T)"
    21	for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do
    22	  for EP in 0 1; do
    23	    OUTDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/${BAND}_${EP}"
    24	    MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    25	    if [[ -s "${MERGED}" ]]; then
    26	      echo "[merge] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} merged exists ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}") bytes)"; continue
    27	    fi
    28	    INPUTS=(); MISS=0
    29	    for PL in "${PLAYLISTS[@]}"; do
    30	      f="${OUTDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_${PL}_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    31	      if [[ -s "${f}" ]]; then INPUTS+=("${f}"); else MISS=$((MISS+1)); fi
    32	    done
    33	    if (( MISS > 0 )); then
    34	      echo "[merge] WAIT ${BAND}:${EP} only $((12-MISS))/12 playlists present; skipping"; continue
    35	    fi
    36	    echo "[merge] ${BAND}:${EP} -> ${MERGED} (12 inputs)"
    37	    if python "${REPO}/2d-unfolding/uq/hadd_universes_full.py" "${MERGED}" "${INPUTS[@]}" > "${MERGEDIR}/merge_${BAND}_${EP}.log" 2>&1; then
    38	      echo "[merge] DONE ${BAND}:${EP} ($(stat -c '%s' "${MERGED}") bytes)"
    39	    else
    40	      echo "[merge] FAIL ${BAND}:${EP} (see ${MERGEDIR}/merge_${BAND}_${EP}.log)"; rm -f "${MERGED}"
    41	    fi
    42	  done
    43	done
    44	NMERGED=$(find "${MERGEDIR}" -name 'runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_*.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    45	echo "[merge] done $(date -u +%T); merged endpoints present=${NMERGED}/10"

1	#!/bin/bash
     2	# P4 stage 2: unfold the 10 merged active endpoint ROOTs -> flat 5D xsec vectors.
     3	# Runs INSIDE a gpu_interactive salloc; concurrent `srun --overlap --gres=none` steps.
     4	# Each merged endpoint is a nominal 5D unfold (NO --universe: the ROOT already IS the
     5	# promoted universe, selection-complete). FIXED --seed 42 on BOTH endpoints of a band
     6	# so the MAT +/- pair cancels the CV but preserves the detector shift. skip-if-exists.
     7	# Set FPS=1 to unfold the P3F merges instead (Agent C's namespace — not run here).
     8	set -o pipefail
     9	export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
    10	
    11	REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    12	ND="${REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    13	BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
    14	CONC="${CONC:-6}"; CPT="${CPT:-20}"
    15	if [[ "${FPS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then MODE=fps; else MODE=standard; fi
    16	MERGEDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/merged"
    17	OUTDIR="${ND}/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/unfolds"   # packet P4 namespace; UNI_RE-compatible names
    18	mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"
    19	
    20	echo "[p4-unfold] mode=${MODE} CONC=${CONC} start $(date -u +%T)"
    21	for BAND in "${BANDS[@]}"; do
    22	  for EP in 0 1; do
    23	    MERGED="${MERGEDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_MEFHC_active_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    24	    OUT="${OUTDIR}/5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_${BAND}_${EP}.root"
    25	    if [[ -s "${OUT}" ]]; then echo "[p4-unfold] SKIP ${BAND}:${EP} (exists)"; continue; fi
    26	    if [[ ! -s "${MERGED}" ]]; then echo "[p4-unfold] WAIT ${BAND}:${EP} merged ROOT absent"; continue; fi
    27	    while [ "$(jobs -rp | wc -l)" -ge "$CONC" ]; do sleep 8; done
    28	    srun --overlap --exact --gres=none -n1 -c"${CPT}" bash -lc "
    29	      export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb OMP_NUM_THREADS=${CPT}
    30	      source '${REPO}/setup_salloc_env.sh' >/dev/null 2>&1
    31	      cd '${ND}'
    32	      python3 unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py --omnifile '${MERGED}' \
    33	        --axes eavail,q3,W --iters 5 --use-weights --estimator lgbm --seed 42 \
    34	        --out '${OUT}' --verbose > '${OUTDIR}/unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log' 2>&1 \
    35	        && echo '[done] ${BAND}:${EP} '\$(date -u +%T) \
    36	        || echo '[FAIL] ${BAND}:${EP} rc='\$? '(see ${OUTDIR}/unfold_${BAND}_${EP}.log)'" &
    37	    sleep 2
    38	  done
    39	done
    40	wait
    41	N=$(find "${OUTDIR}" -name '5d_xsec_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm_uni_full_*_?.root' -size +0c 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    42	echo "[p4-unfold] window done $(date -u +%T); endpoint unfolds present=${N}/10"
     1	#!/bin/bash
     2	#SBATCH --job-name=ev5d_active
     3	#SBATCH --account=m3246
     4	#SBATCH --qos=shared
     5	#SBATCH --constraint=cpu
     6	#SBATCH --nodes=1
     7	#SBATCH --ntasks=1
     8	#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=2
     9	#SBATCH --mem=16G
    10	#SBATCH --time=05:00:00
    11	#SBATCH --array=0-119%12
    12	#SBATCH --export=ALL,HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
    13	#SBATCH --output=nd-unfolding/logs_active/ev5d_active_%A_%a.out
    14	#SBATCH --error=nd-unfolding/logs_active/ev5d_active_%A_%a.err
    15	
    16	# P3S/P3F selection-complete active-universe event loops:
    17	# 5 kinematic bands x 2 endpoints x 12 playlists = 120 per-playlist ROOTs.
    18	# Each requested universe becomes the ORDINARY event-loop universe, rebuilding
    19	# truth/reco selection, backgrounds, truth-authoritative IDs, native misses
    20	# (migration census vs CV written as TParameters). MNV101_DUMP_POINTCLOUD=1 so
    21	# signal/data/background trees carry point-cloud branches for PET P5.
    22	# Do NOT set MNV101_DUMP_UNIVERSES (its shadow branches retain CV-selected support).
    23	#
    24	# ONE playlist per array task (index t -> band=t/24, endpoint=(t/12)%2, playlist=t%12).
    25	# Outputs are ~6-7 GB each (point clouds); the %12 array throttle keeps concurrent
    26	# read+write well below the Lustre thrash point observed at ~40-wide. Non-preemptible
    27	# batch (CPU acct restored); skip-if-exists makes cancel/relaunch safe & resumable.
    28	# Set FPS=1 at submission for the P3F full-phase-space campaign.
    29	
    30	set -o pipefail   # NOT set -u: setup_MAT.sh references unset vars under nounset
    31	export HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb
    32	
    33	REPO="/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    34	PLAYLISTS=(1A 1B 1C 1D 1E 1F 1G 1L 1M 1N 1O 1P)
    35	BANDS=(BeamAngleX BeamAngleY MuonResolution Muon_Energy_MINERvA Muon_Energy_MINOS)
    36	
    37	TASK=${SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID}
    38	PL_INDEX=$((TASK % 12))
    39	ENDPOINT=$(((TASK / 12) % 2))
    40	BAND_INDEX=$((TASK / 24))
    41	PL=${PLAYLISTS[$PL_INDEX]}
    42	BAND=${BANDS[$BAND_INDEX]}
    43	MODE=standard
    44	
    45	source "${REPO}/setup_salloc_env.sh"
    46	export MNV101_ACTIVE_UNIVERSE="${BAND}:${ENDPOINT}"
    47	export MNV101_DUMP_POINTCLOUD=1
    48	export PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
    49	unset MNV101_DUMP_UNIVERSES
    50	if [[ "${FPS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then export MNV101_FULL_PHASE_SPACE=1; MODE=fps; else unset MNV101_FULL_PHASE_SPACE; fi
    51	
    52	OUTDIR="${REPO}/nd-unfolding/active_universe_5d/${MODE}/${BAND}_${ENDPOINT}"
    53	FINAL="${OUTDIR}/runEventLoopOmniFold_5D_${PL}_active_${BAND}_${ENDPOINT}.root"
    54	mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"
    55	if [[ -s "${FINAL}" ]]; then
    56	  echo "[active] SKIP task=${TASK} ${BAND}:${ENDPOINT} ${PL} exists ($(stat -c '%s' "${FINAL}") bytes)"; exit 0
    57	fi
    58	
    59	# unique workdir per batch task so a concurrent interactive orchestrator (which
    60	# uses the un-suffixed name) can never collide on rm -rf / cwd for the same unit.
    61	WORKDIR="${REPO}/nd-unfolding/evloop_work_5d_active_${MODE}_${BAND}_${ENDPOINT}_${PL}_b${SLURM_JOB_ID}"
    62	rm -rf "${WORKDIR}"; mkdir -p "${WORKDIR}"; cd "${WORKDIR}"
    63	DATA="${REPO}/2d-unfolding/playlist_manifests/${PL}_Data.txt"
    64	MC="${REPO}/2d-unfolding/playlist_manifests/${PL}_MC.txt"
    65	BIN="${REPO}/MINERvA101/opt/bin/runEventLoopOmniFold"
    66	echo "[active] task=${TASK} ${BAND}:${ENDPOINT} ${PL} pointcloud=1 md5=$(md5sum "${BIN}"|cut -d' ' -f1)"
    67	"${BIN}" "${DATA}" "${MC}"
    68	mv -v runEventLoopOmniFold.root "${FINAL}"
    69	echo "[active] wrote ${FINAL} ($(stat -c '%s' "${FINAL}") bytes)"
    70	cd "${REPO}" && rm -rf "${WORKDIR}"
     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""N-dimensional unbinned OmniFold driver (axis-list refactor).
     3	
     4	Generalizes the 2D/3D drivers to an arbitrary axis list so a new observable is a
     5	configuration entry, not a copy-pasted reader. The first two axes are ALWAYS the
     6	muon (pt, pz): the analysis gates the fiducial phase space on (pt, pz) and the
     7	flux integral Phi is per-pt -- these are structural to the measurement. Every
     8	further axis is an "extra observable" (eavail, q3, ...) read from named branches
     9	and NOT gated.
    10	
    11	  features  = column_stack([pt, pz, *extras])     (OmniFold is dimension-agnostic)
    12	  binning   = np.histogramdd over all axes
    13	  xsec      = nd-unfolding/xsec_nd.extract_cross_section_nd
    14	  anchors   = drop the trailing extra axes -> recover the lower-D cross section
    15	
    16	Reuse: data/MC/flux/POT/nucleon loaders, the truth (pt,pz) phase-space gate, and
    17	the pt/pz edges come from ../2d-unfolding/unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned.py. Only the
    18	generic multi-axis readers and the bin/extract/project path are new here.
    19	
    20	Extra-axis registry (add a new observable by adding one entry):
    21	  eavail : MC_eavail / sim_eavail / measured_eavail / sim_background_eavail
    22	  q3     : MC_q3     / sim_q3     / measured_q3     / sim_background_q3
    23	
    24	Examples
    25	--------
    26	  # 4D d^4 sigma/(dpt dpz dEavail dq3) on the q3 event-loop output:
    27	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py \
    28	      --omnifile runEventLoopOmniFold_4D_MEFHC.root \
    29	      --axes eavail,q3 --iters 5 --use-weights --estimator lgbm \
    30	      --out products/4d/xsec_4d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root
    31	
    32	  # reproduce the 3D result (eavail only):
    33	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py --omnifile ... --axes eavail ...
    34	
    35	  # closure with an injected bump on the q3 axis:
    36	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py ... --axes eavail,q3 \
    37	      --closure --closure-reweight-axis q3
    38	"""
    39	import argparse
    40	import math
    41	import sys
    42	from array import array
    43	
    44	import numpy as np
    45	import ROOT
    46	
    47	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    48	_2D = f"{_REPO}/2d-unfolding"
    49	_ND = f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    50	for p in (_2D, _ND):
    51	    if p not in sys.path:
    52	        sys.path.insert(0, p)
    53	import unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned as u2d  # noqa: E402
    54	from xsec_nd import (  # noqa: E402
    55	    extract_cross_section_nd, project_marginal, project_axis, total_xsec,
    56	)
    57	
    58	ROOT.gROOT.SetBatch(True)
    59	
    60	# --- Extra-axis registry --------------------------------------------------
    61	# Each extra axis names its truth/reco/data/bkg branches and default edges.
    62	# Physics-motivated low-recoil bins + a catch-all top bin (so the marginal
    63	# captures the full tail and the Jacobian identity holds: every event must land
    64	# in some bin). q3 reco has calorimetric tails, hence the wide catch bin.
    65	# `lateral_invariant`: whether the axis value is UNCHANGED under the lateral
    66	# muon/beam universes. E_avail is invariant (the lateral bands touch only muon
    67	# getters, not the recoil inputs -- Gap 1 finding), so a universe unfold keeps CV
    68	# E_avail. q3 IS shifted by the lateral bands (it depends on the muon kinematics),
    69	# so its per-universe shifted branch (sim_q3_<band>_<idx> / MC_q3_<band>_<idx>)
    70	# must be swapped in for lateral universes. See runEventLoopOmniFold.cpp header.
    71	EXTRA_AXES = {
    72	    "eavail": dict(
    73	        truth="MC_eavail", reco="sim_eavail", data="measured_eavail",
    74	        bkg="sim_background_eavail",
    75	        edges=[0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 1.5, 3.0, 100.0],   # GeV
    76	        label="E_{avail} (GeV)", lateral_invariant=True),
    77	    "q3": dict(
    78	        truth="MC_q3", reco="sim_q3", data="measured_q3",
    79	        bkg="sim_background_q3",
    80	        edges=[0.0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 2.0, 100.0],   # GeV
    81	        label="q_{3} (GeV)", lateral_invariant=False),
    82	    # Workstream F (docs/FUTURE_DIRECTIONS.md item B): hadronic invariant mass W as
    83	    # the 5th axis to localise the open high-E_avail DIS-tail excess (DIS = high W).
    84	    # Truth GetTrueExperimentersW(), reco RecoW() (both muon+recoil dependent), so W
    85	    # is NOT lateral-invariant -- lateral universes dump shifted W (W_truth_/MC_W_/
    86	    # sim_W_<band>_<idx>), exactly like q3. Edges (GeV): QE/elastic peak ~0.94, the
    87	    # Delta resonance ~1.2, the transition/2nd-resonance region, then the DIS tail
    88	    # (W>2) where the excess lives, plus a wide catch bin for the calorimetric tail.
    89	    "W": dict(
    90	        truth="MC_W", reco="sim_W", data="measured_W",
    91	        bkg="sim_background_W",
    92	        edges=[0.0, 1.1, 1.4, 1.8, 2.2, 3.0, 100.0],        # GeV
    93	        label="W (GeV)", lateral_invariant=False),
    94	}
    95	
    96	
    97	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    98	# Generic histogram + ROOT helpers (any dimensionality)
    99	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100	def histnd(cols, w, edges):
   101	    """Weighted np.histogramdd over len(edges) axes -> (counts, sqrt(sumw2))."""
   102	    sample = np.column_stack(cols)
   103	    bins = [np.asarray(e, float) for e in edges]
   104	    counts, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=w)
   105	    sumw2, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=np.asarray(w) ** 2)
   106	    return counts, np.sqrt(sumw2)
   107	
   108	
   109	def write_thnd(f_out, arr, err, name, title, edges, axis_labels):
   110	    """Write an N-D array as a flat TH1D (canonical) + a TH2D when N==2.
   111	
   112	    The flat TH1D (bin = C-order ravel index over `arr.shape`) is what the
   113	    covariance/chi2 tools consume; the full N-D structure is recovered by
   114	    reshaping with the known per-axis edges. (A THnSparseD was tried but its
   115	    Python binding segfaults at 4D on this ROOT build, so we keep the robust flat
   116	    form; the binning lives in the edges, recorded in the docs and the 1D/2D
   117	    projections written alongside.)
   118	    """
   119	    ndim = arr.ndim
   120	    flat = arr.ravel(order="C")
   121	    flat_err = None if err is None else err.ravel(order="C")
   122	    h1 = ROOT.TH1D(name + "_flat", title + ";global bin;value", flat.size, 0, flat.size)
   123	    h1.SetDirectory(0)
   124	    for i, v in enumerate(flat, start=1):
   125	        h1.SetBinContent(i, float(v))
   126	        if flat_err is not None:
   127	            h1.SetBinError(i, float(flat_err[i - 1]))
   128	    f_out.cd(); h1.Write()
   129	
   130	    if ndim == 2:
   131	        h = u2d.make_th2d(name, title, edges[0], edges[1])
   132	        for ix in range(arr.shape[0]):
   133	            for iy in range(arr.shape[1]):
   134	                h.SetBinContent(ix + 1, iy + 1, float(arr[ix, iy]))
   135	                if err is not None:
   136	                    h.SetBinError(ix + 1, iy + 1, float(err[ix, iy]))
   137	        f_out.cd(); h.Write()
   138	
   139	
   140	def numpy_to_th1d(edges, vals, name, title):
   141	    h = u2d.make_th1d(name, title, edges)
   142	    for i, v in enumerate(vals, start=1):
   143	        h.SetBinContent(i, float(v))
   144	    return h
   145	
   146	
   147	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   148	# Generic multi-axis TTree readers (CV weights; pt/pz fixed + extra branches)
   149	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   150	def _addr(t, name):
   151	    a = array("d", [0.0])
   152	    t.SetBranchAddress(name, a)
   153	    return a
   154	
   155	
   156	def _axis_universe_branch(axis_name, suffix, ctx):
   157	    """Per-axis shifted-branch name for a lateral universe, matching the C++
   158	    schema (runEventLoopOmniFold.cpp BuildUniverseBranchTable q3BranchName):
   159	      truth_tree      -> '<axis>_truth_<suffix>'  (e.g. q3_truth_MuonResolution_0)
   160	      reco_tree_truth -> 'MC_<axis>_<suffix>'     (e.g. MC_q3_MuonResolution_0)
   161	      reco_tree_reco  -> 'sim_<axis>_<suffix>'    (e.g. sim_q3_MuonResolution_0)
   162	      bkg_tree        -> 'sim_background_<axis>_<suffix>'
   163	                         (e.g. sim_background_q3_MuonResolution_0; mc_background
   164	                          reco, KNOWN_ISSUES #13)
   165	    Only the lateral-variant axes (q3, W) carry these; eavail is lateral-invariant.
   166	    """
   167	    if ctx == "truth_tree":
   168	        return f"{axis_name}_truth_{suffix}"
   169	    if ctx == "reco_tree_truth":
   170	        return f"MC_{axis_name}_{suffix}"
   171	    if ctx == "reco_tree_reco":
   172	        return f"sim_{axis_name}_{suffix}"
   173	    if ctx == "bkg_tree":
   174	        return f"sim_background_{axis_name}_{suffix}"
   175	    raise ValueError(f"unknown ctx={ctx!r}")
   176	
   177	
   178	def collect_truth_denom_nd(t, extras, pt_lo, pt_hi, pz_lo, pz_hi, pot_scale,
   179	                           use_weights=False, verbose=False, extra_wbranches=None,
   180	                           universe_branch=None):
   181	    """mc_truth_denom -> truth-only (pt, pz, *extras, w) for the completeness denom.
   182	
   183	    extra_wbranches: optional list of truth-side universe weight branch names
   184	    (e.g. w_truth_<band>_<idx>); read aligned to kept events and returned under
   185	    out["extra_w"] as a list of arrays (POT-scaled). Used by the superposition /
   186	    unified-throw cross-check (compare_unified_throw); default None = unchanged.
   187	
   188	    universe_branch=(band, idx): systematic-universe unfold. The truth weight is
   189	    read from w_truth_<band>_<idx>; for LATERAL universes (kinematic branches
   190	    present) pt/pz swap to pT_truth_/pz_truth_<band>_<idx> and every lateral-variant
   191	    extra axis (q3) swaps to <axis>_truth_<band>_<idx>. Lateral-invariant axes
   192	    (eavail) keep their CV branch. Mirrors the 3D driver's --universe path + q3.
   193	    """
   194	    pt_name, pz_name = "MC", "MC_pz"
   195	    ax_truth = [ax["truth"] for ax in extras]
   196	    wt_name = "w_truth"
   197	    if universe_branch is not None:
   198	        wt_name = u2d._universe_truth_branch(universe_branch)
   199	        if not t.GetBranch(wt_name):
   200	            raise RuntimeError(f"[FAIL] '{wt_name}' missing from mc_truth_denom "
   201	                               "(re-run event loop with MNV101_DUMP_UNIVERSES)")
   202	        lpt, lpz = u2d._universe_kine_branches(universe_branch, "truth_tree")
   203	        suffix = f"{u2d._sanitize_band_for_branch(universe_branch[0])}_{int(universe_branch[1])}"
   204	        if t.GetBranch(lpt) and t.GetBranch(lpz):   # lateral
   205	            pt_name, pz_name = lpt, lpz
   206	            for k, ax in enumerate(extras):
   207	                if not ax.get("lateral_invariant", True):
   208	                    nm = _axis_universe_branch(ax["name"], suffix, "truth_tree")
   209	                    if t.GetBranch(nm):
   210	                        ax_truth[k] = nm
   211	            if verbose:
   212	                print(f"[INFO] truth_denom lateral universe: pt/pz+{ '/'.join(ax_truth)} swapped")
   213	    pt_a = _addr(t, pt_name); pz_a = _addr(t, pz_name)
   214	    ex_a = [_addr(t, nm) for nm in ax_truth]
   215	    wt_a = array("d", [1.0])
   216	    if use_weights:
   217	        t.SetBranchAddress(wt_name, wt_a)
   218	    xw_a = [_addr(t, nm) for nm in (extra_wbranches or [])]
   219	    pt_l, pz_l, w_l = [], [], []
   220	    ex_l = [[] for _ in extras]
   221	    xw_l = [[] for _ in (extra_wbranches or [])]
   222	    drop = bad = 0
   223	    for i in range(t.GetEntries()):
   224	        t.GetEntry(i)
   225	        pt, pz = float(pt_a[0]), float(pz_a[0])
   226	        exv = [float(a[0]) for a in ex_a]
   227	        w = float(wt_a[0]) if use_weights else 1.0
   228	        if not (math.isfinite(pt) and math.isfinite(pz) and math.isfinite(w)
   229	                and all(math.isfinite(v) for v in exv) and 0 <= w < 1e4):
   230	            bad += 1; continue
   231	        if not u2d.in_truth_phase_space(pt, pz, pt_lo, pt_hi, pz_lo, pz_hi):
   232	            drop += 1; continue
   233	        pt_l.append(pt); pz_l.append(pz); w_l.append(w * pot_scale)
   234	        for k, v in enumerate(exv):
   235	            ex_l[k].append(v)
   236	        for k, a in enumerate(xw_a):
   237	            xw_l[k].append(float(a[0]) * pot_scale)
   238	    if verbose:
   239	        print(f"[INFO] truth_denom: kept={len(pt_l)} dropped={drop} bad={bad}")
   240	    out = {"pt": np.asarray(pt_l), "pz": np.asarray(pz_l), "w": np.asarray(w_l)}

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""N-dimensional unbinned OmniFold driver (axis-list refactor).
     3	
     4	Generalizes the 2D/3D drivers to an arbitrary axis list so a new observable is a
     5	configuration entry, not a copy-pasted reader. The first two axes are ALWAYS the
     6	muon (pt, pz): the analysis gates the fiducial phase space on (pt, pz) and the
     7	flux integral Phi is per-pt -- these are structural to the measurement. Every
     8	further axis is an "extra observable" (eavail, q3, ...) read from named branches
     9	and NOT gated.
    10	
    11	  features  = column_stack([pt, pz, *extras])     (OmniFold is dimension-agnostic)
    12	  binning   = np.histogramdd over all axes
    13	  xsec      = nd-unfolding/xsec_nd.extract_cross_section_nd
    14	  anchors   = drop the trailing extra axes -> recover the lower-D cross section
    15	
    16	Reuse: data/MC/flux/POT/nucleon loaders, the truth (pt,pz) phase-space gate, and
    17	the pt/pz edges come from ../2d-unfolding/unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned.py. Only the
    18	generic multi-axis readers and the bin/extract/project path are new here.
    19	
    20	Extra-axis registry (add a new observable by adding one entry):
    21	  eavail : MC_eavail / sim_eavail / measured_eavail / sim_background_eavail
    22	  q3     : MC_q3     / sim_q3     / measured_q3     / sim_background_q3
    23	
    24	Examples
    25	--------
    26	  # 4D d^4 sigma/(dpt dpz dEavail dq3) on the q3 event-loop output:
    27	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py \
    28	      --omnifile runEventLoopOmniFold_4D_MEFHC.root \
    29	      --axes eavail,q3 --iters 5 --use-weights --estimator lgbm \
    30	      --out products/4d/xsec_4d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root
    31	
    32	  # reproduce the 3D result (eavail only):
    33	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py --omnifile ... --axes eavail ...
    34	
    35	  # closure with an injected bump on the q3 axis:
    36	  python unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned.py ... --axes eavail,q3 \
    37	      --closure --closure-reweight-axis q3
    38	"""
    39	import argparse
    40	import math
    41	import sys
    42	from array import array
    43	
    44	import numpy as np
    45	import ROOT
    46	
    47	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    48	_2D = f"{_REPO}/2d-unfolding"
    49	_ND = f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding"
    50	for p in (_2D, _ND):
    51	    if p not in sys.path:
    52	        sys.path.insert(0, p)
    53	import unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned as u2d  # noqa: E402
    54	from xsec_nd import (  # noqa: E402
    55	    extract_cross_section_nd, project_marginal, project_axis, total_xsec,
    56	)
    57	
    58	ROOT.gROOT.SetBatch(True)
    59	
    60	# --- Extra-axis registry --------------------------------------------------
    61	# Each extra axis names its truth/reco/data/bkg branches and default edges.
    62	# Physics-motivated low-recoil bins + a catch-all top bin (so the marginal
    63	# captures the full tail and the Jacobian identity holds: every event must land
    64	# in some bin). q3 reco has calorimetric tails, hence the wide catch bin.
    65	# `lateral_invariant`: whether the axis value is UNCHANGED under the lateral
    66	# muon/beam universes. E_avail is invariant (the lateral bands touch only muon
    67	# getters, not the recoil inputs -- Gap 1 finding), so a universe unfold keeps CV
    68	# E_avail. q3 IS shifted by the lateral bands (it depends on the muon kinematics),
    69	# so its per-universe shifted branch (sim_q3_<band>_<idx> / MC_q3_<band>_<idx>)
    70	# must be swapped in for lateral universes. See runEventLoopOmniFold.cpp header.
    71	EXTRA_AXES = {
    72	    "eavail": dict(
    73	        truth="MC_eavail", reco="sim_eavail", data="measured_eavail",
    74	        bkg="sim_background_eavail",
    75	        edges=[0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 1.5, 3.0, 100.0],   # GeV
    76	        label="E_{avail} (GeV)", lateral_invariant=True),
    77	    "q3": dict(
    78	        truth="MC_q3", reco="sim_q3", data="measured_q3",
    79	        bkg="sim_background_q3",
    80	        edges=[0.0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 2.0, 100.0],   # GeV
    81	        label="q_{3} (GeV)", lateral_invariant=False),
    82	    # Workstream F (docs/FUTURE_DIRECTIONS.md item B): hadronic invariant mass W as
    83	    # the 5th axis to localise the open high-E_avail DIS-tail excess (DIS = high W).
    84	    # Truth GetTrueExperimentersW(), reco RecoW() (both muon+recoil dependent), so W
    85	    # is NOT lateral-invariant -- lateral universes dump shifted W (W_truth_/MC_W_/
    86	    # sim_W_<band>_<idx>), exactly like q3. Edges (GeV): QE/elastic peak ~0.94, the
    87	    # Delta resonance ~1.2, the transition/2nd-resonance region, then the DIS tail
    88	    # (W>2) where the excess lives, plus a wide catch bin for the calorimetric tail.
    89	    "W": dict(
    90	        truth="MC_W", reco="sim_W", data="measured_W",
    91	        bkg="sim_background_W",
    92	        edges=[0.0, 1.1, 1.4, 1.8, 2.2, 3.0, 100.0],        # GeV
    93	        label="W (GeV)", lateral_invariant=False),
    94	}
    95	
    96	
    97	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    98	# Generic histogram + ROOT helpers (any dimensionality)
    99	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100	def histnd(cols, w, edges):
   101	    """Weighted np.histogramdd over len(edges) axes -> (counts, sqrt(sumw2))."""
   102	    sample = np.column_stack(cols)
   103	    bins = [np.asarray(e, float) for e in edges]
   104	    counts, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=w)
   105	    sumw2, _ = np.histogramdd(sample, bins=bins, weights=np.asarray(w) ** 2)
   106	    return counts, np.sqrt(sumw2)
   107	
   108	
   109	def write_thnd(f_out, arr, err, name, title, edges, axis_labels):
   110	    """Write an N-D array as a flat TH1D (canonical) + a TH2D when N==2.
   111	
   112	    The flat TH1D (bin = C-order ravel index over `arr.shape`) is what the
   113	    covariance/chi2 tools consume; the full N-D structure is recovered by
   114	    reshaping with the known per-axis edges. (A THnSparseD was tried but its
   115	    Python binding segfaults at 4D on this ROOT build, so we keep the robust flat
   116	    form; the binning lives in the edges, recorded in the docs and the 1D/2D
   117	    projections written alongside.)
   118	    """
   119	    ndim = arr.ndim
   120	    flat = arr.ravel(order="C")
   121	    flat_err = None if err is None else err.ravel(order="C")
   122	    h1 = ROOT.TH1D(name + "_flat", title + ";global bin;value", flat.size, 0, flat.size)
   123	    h1.SetDirectory(0)
   124	    for i, v in enumerate(flat, start=1):
   125	        h1.SetBinContent(i, float(v))
   126	        if flat_err is not None:
   127	            h1.SetBinError(i, float(flat_err[i - 1]))
   128	    f_out.cd(); h1.Write()
   129	
   130	    if ndim == 2:
   131	        h = u2d.make_th2d(name, title, edges[0], edges[1])
   132	        for ix in range(arr.shape[0]):
   133	            for iy in range(arr.shape[1]):
   134	                h.SetBinContent(ix + 1, iy + 1, float(arr[ix, iy]))
   135	                if err is not None:
   136	                    h.SetBinError(ix + 1, iy + 1, float(err[ix, iy]))
   137	        f_out.cd(); h.Write()
   138	
   139	
   140	def numpy_to_th1d(edges, vals, name, title):
   141	    h = u2d.make_th1d(name, title, edges)
   142	    for i, v in enumerate(vals, start=1):
   143	        h.SetBinContent(i, float(v))
   144	    return h
   145

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""P7 covariance marginalization: project an N-D cross-section covariance onto a
     3	lower-dimensional subset of axes as C_low = M C_high M^T (uq_math.project_covariance).
     4	
     5	The stored cross section is a DIFFERENTIAL DENSITY per unit bin-volume
     6	(xsec_nd.extract_cross_section_nd divides by prod_a dx_a). Marginalizing over an
     7	axis is therefore a WIDTH-WEIGHTED sum: M's nonzero entries are the product of the
     8	bin widths of the DROPPED axes, grouped into the destination (kept-axis) bin.
     9	Unit-weight M would be WRONG for this convention. This mirrors the validated maps in
    10	eavail_generator_significance.py:83-89 (4D->E_avail) and eavailW_covariance.py:290-304
    11	(5D->(E_avail,W)); the only generalization here is arbitrary keep-axis subsets.
    12	
    13	Axis order is the C-order ravel convention (pt, pz, eavail, q3[, W]). The reported
    14	mask is CV>0. When --dst-cv is given, the destination reported mask/shape is taken
    15	from that frozen lower-D central product (so masks match a real result); otherwise
    16	the destination reports every bin that receives a reported source cell.
    17	
    18	  # 5D adopted covariance -> exact 4D marginal (drop W), reporting onto the 4D CV mask
    19	  python project_cov_nd.py \
    20	      --src-cov uq_5d/.../uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_bkgaware_uthrow.root \
    21	      --src-hist hCov_combined5d_total_uthrow \
    22	      --src-cv products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root --src-axes pt,pz,eavail,q3,W \
    23	      --keep-axes pt,pz,eavail,q3 \
    24	      --dst-cv products/4d/xsec_4d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root \
    25	      --out uq_4d/corrected/projections_candidate/cov_5d_to_4d_marginal.root
    26	"""
    27	import argparse
    28	import os
    29	import sys
    30	
    31	import numpy as np
    32	
    33	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    34	for _p in (f"{_REPO}/2d-unfolding", f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding"):
    35	    if _p not in sys.path:
    36	        sys.path.insert(0, _p)
    37	
    38	from uq_math import project_covariance              # noqa: E402  (ROOT-free)
    39	
    40	# Canonical analysis bin edges (C-order axes pt,pz,eavail,q3,W). Hardcoded so the
    41	# M-construction stays ROOT-free/testable; _verify_canonical_edges() below fails
    42	# closed if these ever drift from unfold_2d/unfold_nd (which import ROOT).
    43	AXIS_EDGES = {
    44	    "pt": np.array([0, 0.07, 0.15, 0.25, 0.33, 0.40, 0.47, 0.55,
    45	                    0.70, 0.85, 1.00, 1.25, 1.50, 2.50, 4.50], float),
    46	    "pz": np.array([1.5, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0,
    47	                    6.0, 7.0, 8.0, 9.0, 10.0, 15.0, 20.0, 40.0, 60.0], float),
    48	    "eavail": np.array([0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 1.5, 3.0, 100.0], float),
    49	    "q3": np.array([0.0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1.2, 2.0, 100.0], float),
    50	    "W": np.array([0.0, 1.1, 1.4, 1.8, 2.2, 3.0, 100.0], float),
    51	}
    52	
    53	
    54	def _verify_canonical_edges():
    55	    """Fail closed if the hardcoded edges drift from the canonical modules."""
    56	    import unfold_2d_omnifold_unbinned as u2d       # imports ROOT
    57	    import unfold_nd_omnifold_unbinned as und
    58	    ref = {"pt": u2d.PT_EDGES, "pz": u2d.PZ_EDGES,
    59	           "eavail": und.EXTRA_AXES["eavail"]["edges"],
    60	           "q3": und.EXTRA_AXES["q3"]["edges"], "W": und.EXTRA_AXES["W"]["edges"]}
    61	    for a, e in ref.items():
    62	        if not np.allclose(np.asarray(e, float), AXIS_EDGES[a]):
    63	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] canonical edge drift on axis {a}: "
    64	                             f"{np.asarray(e, float)} != {AXIS_EDGES[a]}")
    65	
    66	
    67	def _th1(h):
    68	    return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(h.GetNbinsX())])
    69	
    70	
    71	def _th2(h):
    72	    nx, ny = h.GetNbinsX(), h.GetNbinsY()
    73	    b = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64,
    74	                      count=(nx + 2) * (ny + 2)).reshape(ny + 2, nx + 2)
    75	    return b[1:ny + 1, 1:nx + 1].T.copy()
    76	
    77	
    78	def build_projection(src_axes, keep_axes, src_report, src_shape, dst_shape, dst_index_of):
    79	    """M (n_dst x n_src_reported): entries = product of dropped-axis bin widths,
    80	    grouped into the destination flat index. dst_index_of maps a dense dst flat index
    81	    to the destination reported row (or -1 to drop)."""
    82	    drop_axes = [a for a in src_axes if a not in keep_axes]
    83	    keep_pos = [src_axes.index(a) for a in keep_axes]
    84	    idx = np.unravel_index(src_report, src_shape)          # C-order, tuple of arrays
    85	    # width weight = product over dropped axes of that axis's bin width
    86	    w = np.ones(src_report.size)
    87	    for a in drop_axes:
    88	        pos = src_axes.index(a)
    89	        w = w * np.diff(AXIS_EDGES[a])[idx[pos]]
    90	    # destination dense flat index from the kept-axis coordinates
    91	    dst_coords = tuple(idx[p] for p in keep_pos)
    92	    dst_dense = np.ravel_multi_index(dst_coords, dst_shape)
    93	    dst_row = dst_index_of[dst_dense]                       # reported row or -1
    94	    n_dst = int((dst_index_of >= 0).sum())
    95	    M = np.zeros((n_dst, src_report.size))
    96	    keep = dst_row >= 0
    97	    M[dst_row[keep], np.arange(src_report.size)[keep]] = w[keep]
    98	    dropped = int((~keep).sum())
    99	    return M, dropped

   102	def main():
   103	    import ROOT
   104	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=__doc__,
   105	                                 formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter)
   106	    ap.add_argument("--src-cov", required=True)
   107	    ap.add_argument("--src-hist", required=True)
   108	    ap.add_argument("--src-cv", required=True, help="source CV product (hXSecND_flat) for mask+shape")
   109	    ap.add_argument("--src-axes", required=True, help="comma list, C-order, e.g. pt,pz,eavail,q3,W")
   110	    ap.add_argument("--keep-axes", required=True, help="comma list subset to keep")
   111	    ap.add_argument("--dst-cv", default=None,
   112	                    help="frozen lower-D CV product; its CV>0 mask defines the destination "
   113	                         "reported bins. If omitted, report every bin that receives a source cell.")
   114	    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
   115	    args = ap.parse_args()
   116	    _verify_canonical_edges()
   117	
   118	    src_axes = args.src_axes.split(",")
   119	    keep_axes = args.keep_axes.split(",")
   120	    if not set(keep_axes).issubset(set(src_axes)):
   121	        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] keep-axes {keep_axes} not a subset of src-axes {src_axes}")
   122	    if list(keep_axes) != [a for a in src_axes if a in keep_axes]:
   123	        raise SystemExit("[FAIL] keep-axes must preserve the source C-order")
   124	    for a in src_axes:
   125	        if a not in AXIS_EDGES:
   126	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] unknown axis {a}")
   127	
   128	    src_shape = tuple(len(AXIS_EDGES[a]) - 1 for a in src_axes)
   129	    dst_shape = tuple(len(AXIS_EDGES[a]) - 1 for a in keep_axes)
   130	
   131	    fcv = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.src_cv)
   132	    xsrc = _th1(fcv.Get("hXSecND_flat")); fcv.Close()
   133	    if xsrc.size != int(np.prod(src_shape)):
   134	        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] src CV size {xsrc.size} != prod(src_shape) {np.prod(src_shape)}")
   135	    src_report = np.where(xsrc > 0)[0]
   136	
   137	    fc = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.src_cov)
   138	    C = _th2(fc.Get(args.src_hist)); fc.Close()
   139	    if C.shape != (src_report.size, src_report.size):
   140	        raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] src cov {C.shape} != reported mask {(src_report.size,)*2}")
   141	
   142	    # destination reported mask / index map
   143	    n_dense = int(np.prod(dst_shape))
   144	    dst_index_of = -np.ones(n_dense, dtype=int)
   145	    if args.dst_cv:
   146	        fd = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.dst_cv)
   147	        xdst = _th1(fd.Get("hXSecND_flat")); fd.Close()
   148	        if xdst.size != n_dense:
   149	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] dst CV size {xdst.size} != prod(dst_shape) {n_dense}")
   150	        dst_report = np.where(xdst > 0)[0]
   151	        dst_index_of[dst_report] = np.arange(dst_report.size)
   152	        x_dst_cv = xdst[dst_report]
   153	    else:
   154	        # provisional: fill after we know which dense bins receive a source cell
   155	        idx = np.unravel_index(src_report, src_shape)
   156	        keep_pos = [src_axes.index(a) for a in keep_axes]
   157	        dst_dense_hit = np.unique(np.ravel_multi_index(tuple(idx[p] for p in keep_pos), dst_shape))
   158	        dst_index_of[dst_dense_hit] = np.arange(dst_dense_hit.size)
   159	        x_dst_cv = None
   160	
   161	    M, dropped = build_projection(src_axes, keep_axes, src_report, src_shape,
   162	                                  dst_shape, dst_index_of)
   163	    n_dst = M.shape[0]
   164	    C_low = project_covariance(C, M)
   165	    C_low = 0.5 * (C_low + C_low.T)
   166	
   167	    # --- CV reproduction: y = M x_src should match the frozen dst CV (density) ---
   168	    y = M @ xsrc[src_report]
   169	    print(f"[proj] {src_axes} -> keep {keep_axes}")
   170	    print(f"[proj] src reported = {src_report.size}  dst reported = {n_dst}  "
   171	          f"src cells dropped (dst bin not reported) = {dropped}")
   172	    if x_dst_cv is not None:
   173	        rows_hit = np.zeros(n_dst, bool)
   174	        # count dst-reported bins that received zero source cells
   175	        received = np.asarray(M != 0).any(axis=1)
   176	        n_empty = int((~received).sum())
   177	        with np.errstate(divide="ignore", invalid="ignore"):
   178	            rel = np.where(x_dst_cv > 0, np.abs(y - x_dst_cv) / x_dst_cv, 0.0)
   179	        print(f"[proj] dst-reported bins receiving NO source cell = {n_empty}")
   180	        print(f"[proj] CV reproduction M x_src vs frozen dst CV: "
   181	              f"max|rel|={rel.max():.3e} median={np.median(rel):.3e} "
   182	              f"(expected ~<=3% -- independent lower-D central vs marginal)")
   183	
   184	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(C_low)
   185	    sym = float(np.abs(C_low - C_low.T).max())
   186	    rc = 1e-12
   187	    rank = int((ev > ev.max() * rc).sum()) if ev.size else 0
   188	    print(f"[proj] C_low {C_low.shape}  sqrt-tr={np.sqrt(max(np.trace(C_low),0)):.4e}")
   189	    print(f"[proj] symmetry max|C-C^T|={sym:.2e}  min-eig={ev[0]:.3e}  "
   190	          f"most-neg/max={ev[0]/ev[-1]:.2e}  rank~{rank}/{n_dst}")
   191	    psd_ok = ev[0] >= -1e-10 * ev[-1]
   192	    print(f"[proj] PSD (to machine tol): {'OK' if psd_ok else 'FAIL'}")
   193	
   194	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.out) or ".", exist_ok=True)
   195	    fo = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.out, "RECREATE")
   196	    hn = "_".join(keep_axes)
   197	    h = ROOT.TH2D(f"hCov_proj_{hn}", f"projected cov ({'->'.join([''.join(src_axes), hn])})",
   198	                  n_dst, 0, n_dst, n_dst, 0, n_dst)
   199	    for i in range(n_dst):
   200	        for j in range(n_dst):
   201	            h.SetBinContent(i + 1, j + 1, float(C_low[i, j]))
   202	    h.Write()
   203	    hy = ROOT.TH1D("hCV_marginal", "M x_src (marginalized CV density)", n_dst, 0, n_dst)
   204	    for i in range(n_dst):
   205	        hy.SetBinContent(i + 1, float(y[i]))
   206	    hy.Write()
   207	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("sqrt_tr", float(np.sqrt(max(np.trace(C_low), 0)))).Write()
   208	    ROOT.TParameter("int")("n_dst", n_dst).Write()
   209	    ROOT.TParameter("int")("src_cells_dropped", dropped).Write()
   210	    fo.Close()
   211	    print(f"[proj] wrote {args.out}  (CANDIDATE -- do not quote until governing 5D cov is final)")
   212	
   213	
   214	if __name__ == "__main__":
   215	    main()

    22	def check(name, M, cvr, res, ok):
    23	    symm = float(np.abs(M - M.T).max())
    24	    fin = bool(np.all(np.isfinite(M)))
    25	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(0.5 * (M + M.T))
    26	    psd = bool(ev[0] >= -1e-10 * ev[-1])
    27	    diag = np.sqrt(np.clip(np.diag(M), 0, None))
    28	    medrel = float(np.median(np.where(cvr > 0, diag / cvr, 0.0)))
    29	    res[name] = {"dim_ok": M.shape == (cvr.size, cvr.size),
    30	                 "sqrt_tr": float(np.sqrt(max(np.trace(M), 0.0))),
    31	                 "median_rel_pct": 100 * medrel, "symm_maxabs": symm, "finite": fin,
    32	                 "min_eig": float(ev[0]), "min_over_max": float(ev[0] / ev[-1]),
    33	                 "psd_ok": psd, "rank_1e-12": int((ev > ev.max() * 1e-12).sum())}
    34	    return ok and res[name]["dim_ok"] and fin and psd
    35	
    36	
    37	fc = ROOT.TFile.Open(CV); hx = fc.Get("hXSecND_flat")
    38	xf = np.array([hx.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(hx.GetNbinsX())]); fc.Close()
    39	cvr = xf[xf > 0]
    40	n_rep = int(cvr.size)
    41	
    42	res = {"reported_bins": n_rep, "expected_bins": 4830}
    43	ok = n_rep == 4830
    44	
    45	fu = ROOT.TFile.Open(f"{BASE}/unified_throw_cov_4d.root")
    46	Cuni, Cblk = th2(fu.Get("C_unified")), th2(fu.Get("C_blocksum"))
    47	res["params"] = {"sqrt_tr_unified": par(fu, "sqrt_tr_unified"),
    48	                 "sqrt_tr_block": par(fu, "sqrt_tr_block"),
    49	                 "joint_mean_shift_norm": par(fu, "joint_mean_shift_norm"),
    50	                 "fixed_seed_null_norm": par(fu, "fixed_seed_null_norm")}
    51	np_ = fu.Get("n_throws"); res["params"]["n_throws"] = int(np_.GetVal()) if np_ else None
    52	fu.Close()
    53	ok = check("unified", Cuni, cvr, res, ok)
    54	ok = check("blocksum", Cblk, cvr, res, ok)
    55	res["ratio_unified_over_block"] = res["params"]["sqrt_tr_unified"] / res["params"]["sqrt_tr_block"]
    56	ok = ok and res["params"]["n_throws"] == 160
    57	
    58	for tag, fname in [("adopted_mean", "uq_universe_4d_covariance_combined_uthrow.root"),
    59	                   ("adopted_cv", "uq_universe_4d_covariance_combined_uthrow_cvcentered.root")]:
    60	    fa = ROOT.TFile.Open(f"{BASE}/universe_stage2_4d/{fname}")
    61	    Ca = th2(fa.Get("hCov_combined4d_total_uthrow"))
    62	    st_old, st_new = par(fa, "sqrt_tr_old"), par(fa, "sqrt_tr_new")
    63	    fa.Close()
    64	    ok = check(tag, Ca, cvr, res, ok)
    65	    res[tag]["sqrt_tr_old"] = st_old
    66	    res[tag]["inflation_factor"] = st_new / st_old if st_old else None
    67	
    68	res["ALL_OK"] = bool(ok)
    69	with open(f"{BASE}/unified_throw_and_adopt_4d.summary.json", "w") as fh:
    70	    json.dump(res, fh, indent=2)
    71	print(json.dumps(res, indent=2))
    72	print(f"[VALIDATE] 4D unified-throw + candidate adopt: ALL_OK={ok}")

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""D5 -- assemble the ADOPTED GBDT 5D covariance from the unified-throw systematic.
     3	
     4	Adopted GBDT total covariance =
     5	    C_unified                         (unified-throw systematic: all VERTICAL reweight
     6	                                        universes -- Flux, GENIE knobs, 2p2h -- re-unfolded
     7	                                        together, so cross-band correlations are captured)
     8	  + hCov_stat5d_reported              (bootstrap statistical)
     9	  + hCov_mlsplit5d_reported           (ML train/test-split)
    10	  + sum of the 9 DETECTOR-LATERAL bands (shifted-kinematics response, which a frozen-sample
    11	    reweight throw cannot produce, so they are added from the per-band universe file):
    12	      BeamAngleX, BeamAngleY, MuonResolution, Muon_Energy_MINERvA, Muon_Energy_MINOS,
    13	      MinosEfficiency, GEANT_Neutron, GEANT_Pion, GEANT_Proton
    14	
    15	This is the unified-throw analogue of the published block-sum GBDT budget: the vertical
    16	bands move from a per-band block sum into the single re-unfolded C_unified (which also
    17	carries their cross-correlations + the retraining nonlinearity), while the lateral +
    18	stat + ML pieces are unchanged. All inputs are TH2D on the SAME 10694-bin CV>0 reported
    19	ordering (hXSecND_flat mask of the 14x16x7x7x6 grid). ROOT TH2D::Add does the sum at
    20	C++ speed. Writes a NEW file (uq_5d/gbdt_5d_covariance_adopted.root); touches nothing.
    21	
    22	Run from nd-unfolding/ after `source ../setup_salloc_env.sh`:
    23	  python assemble_gbdt5d_adopted.py
    24	"""
    25	import argparse
    26	import os
    27	
    28	import numpy as np
    29	
    30	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    31	
    32	LAT_BANDS = ["BeamAngleX", "BeamAngleY", "MuonResolution",
    33	             "Muon_Energy_MINERvA", "Muon_Energy_MINOS", "MinosEfficiency",
    34	             "GEANT_Neutron", "GEANT_Pion", "GEANT_Proton"]
    35	
    36	
    37	def diag(h):
    38	    n = h.GetNbinsX()
    39	    return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i, i) for i in range(1, n + 1)])
    40	
    41	
    42	def main():
    43	    import ROOT
    44	    ROOT.gErrorIgnoreLevel = ROOT.kError
    45	
    46	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    47	    ap.add_argument("--unified", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/uq_5d/unified_throw_cov_5d.root")
    48	    ap.add_argument("--unified-hist", default="C_unified")
    49	    ap.add_argument("--stat", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/uq_cov_stat_5d.root")
    50	    ap.add_argument("--stat-hist", default="hCov_stat5d_reported")
    51	    ap.add_argument("--ml", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/uq_cov_mlsplit_5d.root")
    52	    ap.add_argument("--ml-hist", default="hCov_mlsplit5d_reported")
    53	    ap.add_argument("--univ", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/"
    54	                                      "uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined.root")
    55	    ap.add_argument("--cv", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root")
    56	    ap.add_argument("--cv-hist", default="hXSecND_flat")
    57	    ap.add_argument("--out", default=f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding/uq_5d/gbdt_5d_covariance_adopted.root")
    58	    args = ap.parse_args()
    59	
    60	    comp_tr = {}  # component sqrt(trace) for the budget printout
    61	
    62	    # ---- C_unified is the accumulator ----
    63	    fu = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.unified)
    64	    hU = fu.Get(args.unified_hist)
    65	    assert hU, f"missing {args.unified_hist} in {args.unified}"
    66	    hTot = hU.Clone("hCov_gbdt5d_adopted")
    67	    hTot.SetDirectory(0)
    68	    n = hTot.GetNbinsX()
    69	    comp_tr["unified"] = float(np.sqrt(diag(hU).sum()))
    70	    fu.Close()
    71	    print(f"[D5] C_unified: n={n}  sqrt(tr)={comp_tr['unified']:.4e}")
    72	
    73	    # ---- + stat, + ML ----
    74	    for tag, path, hist in (("stat", args.stat, args.stat_hist),
    75	                            ("ml", args.ml, args.ml_hist)):
    76	        f = ROOT.TFile.Open(path)
    77	        h = f.Get(hist)
    78	        assert h, f"missing {hist} in {path}"
    79	        assert h.GetNbinsX() == n, f"{hist} dim {h.GetNbinsX()} != {n}"
    80	        comp_tr[tag] = float(np.sqrt(diag(h).sum()))
    81	        hTot.Add(h)
    82	        f.Close()
    83	        print(f"[D5] + {tag:5s} ({hist}): sqrt(tr)={comp_tr[tag]:.4e}")
    84	
    85	    # ---- + 9 detector-lateral bands ----
    86	    fl = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.univ)
    87	    lat_tr2 = 0.0
    88	    for b in LAT_BANDS:
    89	        h = fl.Get(f"hCov_universe5d_{b}")
    90	        assert h, f"missing hCov_universe5d_{b} in {args.univ}"
    91	        assert h.GetNbinsX() == n, f"{b} dim {h.GetNbinsX()} != {n}"
    92	        lat_tr2 += diag(h).sum()
    93	        hTot.Add(h)
    94	        print(f"[D5] + lateral {b:22s} sqrt(tr)={np.sqrt(diag(h).sum()):.4e}")
    95	    fl.Close()
    96	    comp_tr["lateral_sum9"] = float(np.sqrt(lat_tr2))
    97	
    98	    # ---- totals + per-bin fractional summary ----
    99	    d_tot = diag(hTot)
   100	    comp_tr["ADOPTED_total"] = float(np.sqrt(d_tot.sum()))
   101	
   102	    fc = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.cv)
   103	    hcv = fc.Get(args.cv_hist)
   104	    cv_full = np.array([hcv.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(hcv.GetNbinsX())])
   105	    fc.Close()
   106	    rep = cv_full[cv_full > 0]
   107	    assert rep.size == n, f"CV reported {rep.size} != cov dim {n}"
   108	    frac = np.sqrt(np.clip(d_tot, 0, None)) / rep
   109	    med = float(np.median(frac[np.isfinite(frac) & (frac > 0)]))
   110	
   111	    print("\n=== D5 adopted GBDT 5D covariance -- component sqrt(trace) budget ===")
   112	    for k in ("unified", "lateral_sum9", "stat", "ml", "ADOPTED_total"):
   113	        print(f"  {k:16s} {comp_tr[k]:.4e}")
   114	    print(f"  median per-bin fractional uncertainty = {100*med:.2f}%   (n_bins={n})")
   115	
   116	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.out), exist_ok=True)
   117	    fo = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.out, "RECREATE")
   118	    hTot.Write()
   119	    for k, v in comp_tr.items():
   120	        ROOT.TParameter("double")(f"sqrt_tr_{k}", v).Write()
   121	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("median_frac", med).Write()
   122	    fo.Close()
   123	    print(f"\n[D5] wrote {args.out} :: hCov_gbdt5d_adopted")
   124	
   125	
   126	if __name__ == "__main__":
   127	    main()

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""Adopt the rigorous 5D unified-throw systematic into the published combined 5D covariance.
     3	
     4	5D (pt,pz,Eavail,q3,W) analogue of adopt_unified_4d.py. The unified throw
     5	(uq_5d/unified_throw_cov_5d.root, joint re-unfolds of the 12 knob bands + 100 flux
     6	universes) measures the per-bin systematic variance INCLUDING the nonlinear
     7	cross-band term the block-sum drops. But with n_throws << bins, C_unified is a
     8	low-rank (noisy) estimate of the full N x N matrix; swapping the whole matrix in
     9	directly breaks positive-definiteness. So -- exactly as in 4D (adopt_unified_4d.py) --
    10	we adopt the throw's fractional per-bin variance INFLATION and transfer it onto the
    11	SWEEP's own vertical block, PSD by construction:
    12	
    13	    g_i = sqrt( max(sigma_uni_i^2, sigma_block_i^2) ) / sigma_block_i   >= 1
    14	    C_combined_new = (C_combined_old - C_vert_sweep) + G C_vert_sweep G
    15	                   = C_combined_old + (g_i g_j - 1) * C_vert_sweep       <- PSD by construction
    16	
    17	C_vert_sweep = sum of the 13 vertical per-band covs (12 knobs + Flux) the throw covers,
    18	from the combined file's per-band hCov_universe5d_<band> (same sweep estimator as C_comb).
    19	The 9 detector-lateral bands and the stat/ML blocks already inside hCov_combined5d_total
    20	are left untouched -- the throw does not cover them. The conservative max() never
    21	UNDER-covers vs the block baseline; it inflates where the nonlinear cross-term is real.
    22	
    23	Memory-frugal: 10694^2 f64 ~= 0.9 GB/matrix; only C_comb + C_vert are resident, and
    24	C_new is built into C_comb row-by-row (1-D temporaries), so peak ~2 matrices + eigvalsh.
    25	
    26	  python adopt_unified_5d.py    # -> uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_uthrow.root
    27	"""
    28	import argparse
    29	import gc
    30	import sys
    31	
    32	import numpy as np
    33	
    34	_REPO = "/pscratch/sd/j/josephrb/MINERvA-OmniFold"
    35	for _p in (f"{_REPO}/2d-unfolding", f"{_REPO}/nd-unfolding"):
    36	    if _p not in sys.path:
    37	        sys.path.insert(0, _p)
    38	
    39	# the 13 vertical bands the 5D unified throw covers (12 KNOB_BANDS + Flux); identical
    40	# to the 4D set -- verified present in both bank_uthrow_5d and the per-band sweep covs.
    41	VERT_BANDS = ["2p2h", "CCQEPauliSupViaKF", "FrAbs_pi", "FrElas_N", "HighQ2", "LowQ2",
    42	              "MaCCQE", "MaRES", "MFP_N", "MvRES", "Rvn2pi", "Rvp2pi", "Flux"]
    43	
    44	
    45	def _th2(h):
    46	    nx, ny = h.GetNbinsX(), h.GetNbinsY()
    47	    b = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64, count=(nx + 2) * (ny + 2)).reshape(ny + 2, nx + 2)
    48	    return b[1:ny + 1, 1:nx + 1].T.copy()
    49	
    50	
    51	def _diag(h):
    52	    """Read only the diagonal of a square TH2D (no full-matrix materialization)."""
    53	    n = h.GetNbinsX()
    54	    return np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1, i + 1) for i in range(n)])
    55	
    56	
    57	def _write_th2(name, title, M):
    58	    """Fast dense TH2D write via the writable ROOT buffer (avoids 1e8 SetBinContent calls)."""
    59	    import ROOT
    60	    n = M.shape[0]
    61	    h = ROOT.TH2D(name, title, n, 0, n, n, 0, n)
    62	    arr = np.frombuffer(h.GetArray(), dtype=np.float64, count=(n + 2) * (n + 2)).reshape(n + 2, n + 2)
    63	    try:
    64	        arr.setflags(write=True)
    65	    except Exception:
    66	        pass
    67	    arr[1:n + 1, 1:n + 1] = M.T   # _th2 reads inner.T; for symmetric M this round-trips exactly
    68	    return h
    69	
    70	
    71	def main():
    72	    import ROOT
    73	    ROOT.gErrorIgnoreLevel = ROOT.kError
    74	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    75	    ap.add_argument("--uthrow", default="uq_5d/unified_throw_cov_5d.root")
    76	    ap.add_argument("--combined",
    77	                    default="uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined.root")
    78	    ap.add_argument("--prod", default="products/5d/xsec_5d_MEFHC_5iter_lgbm.root")
    79	    ap.add_argument("--out",
    80	                    default="uq_5d/universe_stage2_5d/uq_universe_5d_covariance_combined_uthrow.root")
    81	    ap.add_argument("--cv-centered", action="store_true",
    82	                    help="F7 CV-centered variant: add per-bin joint mean_shift^2 to the unified "
    83	                         "variance (default is mean-centered, diag(C_unified) only)")
    84	    args = ap.parse_args()
    85	
    86	    # --- per-bin inflation factor g from the throw (diagonals only; cheap) ---
    87	    fu = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.uthrow)
    88	    vu = np.clip(_diag(fu.Get("C_unified")), 0, None)   # unified per-bin variance (mean-centered)
    89	    vb = np.clip(_diag(fu.Get("C_blocksum")), 0, None)  # bank block-sum per-bin variance (comparator)
    90	    if args.cv_centered:
    91	        # F7: CV-centered variance = mean-centered variance + shift^2 (do NOT silently drop the shift)
    92	        hms = fu.Get("hJointMeanShift")
    93	        ms = np.array([hms.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(hms.GetNbinsX())])
    94	        assert ms.size == vu.size, f"mean_shift dim {ms.size} != unified dim {vu.size}"
    95	        vu = vu + ms ** 2
    96	    fu.Close()
    97	    s_adopt = np.sqrt(np.maximum(vu, vb))               # conservative: never below block baseline
    98	    sb = np.sqrt(vb)
    99	    n = vu.size
   100	    g = np.ones(n)
   101	    m = sb > 0
   102	    g[m] = s_adopt[m] / sb[m]                            # >= 1
   103	
   104	    # --- reported CV (frac/bin diagnostics + dim check) ---
   105	    fp = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.prod)
   106	    h = fp.Get("hXSecND_flat")
   107	    xfull = np.array([h.GetBinContent(i + 1) for i in range(h.GetNbinsX())])
   108	    fp.Close()
   109	    x = xfull[xfull > 0]
   110	    assert x.size == n, f"reported CV ({x.size}) != throw dim ({n})"
   111	
   112	    # --- load C_comb (becomes C_new in place) + the sweep vertical block sum ---
   113	    fc = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.combined)
   114	    C_new = _th2(fc.Get("hCov_combined5d_total"))
   115	    assert C_new.shape == (n, n), f"combined dim {C_new.shape} != throw dim {n}"
   116	    sqrt_tr_comb = float(np.sqrt(np.trace(C_new)))
   117	    diag_comb = np.clip(np.diag(C_new), 0, None).copy()
   118	    C_vert = None
   119	    for b in VERT_BANDS:
   120	        hb = fc.Get(f"hCov_universe5d_{b}")
   121	        if not hb:
   122	            raise SystemExit(f"[FAIL] missing per-band cov hCov_universe5d_{b}")
   123	        cb = _th2(hb)
   124	        if C_vert is None:
   125	            C_vert = cb
   126	        else:
   127	            C_vert += cb
   128	            del cb
   129	            gc.collect()
   130	    fc.Close()
   131	
   132	    # --- C_new = C_comb + (g_i g_j - 1) * C_vert   (row-by-row; peak ~2 matrices) ---
   133	    for i in range(n):
   134	        C_new[i, :] += (g[i] * g - 1.0) * C_vert[i, :]
   135	    del C_vert
   136	    gc.collect()
   137	
   138	    # --- verification (eigvalsh reads the lower triangle; construction-symmetric) ---
   139	    ev = np.linalg.eigvalsh(C_new)
   140	    diag_new = np.clip(np.diag(C_new), 0, None)
   141	    do = np.sqrt(diag_comb) / x
   142	    dn = np.sqrt(diag_new) / x
   143	    sqrt_tr_new = float(np.sqrt(np.trace(C_new)))
   144	    print(f"[adopt5d] bins                = {n}  (reported)")
   145	    print(f"[adopt5d] inflation g: bins>1 = {(g > 1.0001).sum()} ({100*(g>1.0001).mean():.1f}%)  "
   146	          f"median={np.median(g):.3f}  max={g.max():.2f}")
   147	    print(f"[adopt5d] sqrt-trace  old combined = {sqrt_tr_comb:.4e}")
   148	    print(f"[adopt5d] sqrt-trace  new combined = {sqrt_tr_new:.4e}  "
   149	          f"(x{sqrt_tr_new/sqrt_tr_comb:.3f})")
   150	    print(f"[adopt5d] median frac/bin  old={100*np.median(do):.2f}%   new={100*np.median(dn):.2f}%")
   151	    print(f"[adopt5d] PSD check: min eigenvalue = {ev[0]:.3e}  "
   152	          f"(neg: {(ev<0).sum()}; most-neg/max = {ev[0]/ev[-1]:.2e})")
   153	    if ev[0] < -1e-12 * ev[-1]:
   154	        raise SystemExit("[FAIL] adopted covariance is not PSD")
   155	    print("[adopt5d] PSD OK (PSD by construction: lateral+stat+ML + G C_vert G)")
   156	
   157	    # --- write ---
   158	    fo = ROOT.TFile.Open(args.out, "RECREATE")
   159	    hnew = _write_th2("hCov_combined5d_total_uthrow",
   160	                      "combined 5D cov (unified-throw adopted)", C_new)
   161	    hnew.Write()
   162	    hg = ROOT.TH1D("hInflation_g", "per-bin unified/block sigma inflation", n, 0, n)
   163	    for i in range(n):
   164	        hg.SetBinContent(i + 1, g[i])
   165	    hg.Write()
   166	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("sqrt_tr_old", sqrt_tr_comb).Write()
   167	    ROOT.TParameter("double")("sqrt_tr_new", sqrt_tr_new).Write()
   168	    fo.Close()
   169	    print(f"[adopt5d] wrote {args.out}")
   170	
   171	
   172	if __name__ == "__main__":
   173	    main()
